description: Native American English, flat Great Lakes Michigan underneath. Male, 70s. Refined but physically worn, never frail in the mind. Persona: dry logistics magnate. Emotion: exact, sardonic, controlled. A low quiet baritone, boardroom-polished over a yard-foreman flatness in the vowels; short declarative bursts with rests between them, consonants softening at the edges, landing a point by going quieter rather than louder.
text: [deliberate] Forty years, I moved ten thousand tons with these fingers... never lifted a crate. [sarcastic] Now they call my chair the last vehicle in the fleet. [serious] Give me a route, a precise answer. And?
